style_prompt: Editorial cover illustration for a whitepaper. Muted Alberta cream (#F7F4ED) base, navy (#1A3A6E) and rust (#C2491A) accents. Print-quality archival feel. No text, no logos. Wide cover aspect.
image_prompt: An editorial cover illustration on warm cream paper, deep Alberta navy line work with small rust-coloured accents. A central walled keep sits at the middle, and around it many small open workshops and benches are connected to it by light paths, suggesting a protected core with building happening freely all around. Calm, archival, abstract. Wide cover aspect. No text, no logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
Editorial cover illustration for a whitepaper. Muted Alberta cream (#F7F4ED) base, navy (#1A3A6E) and rust (#C2491A) accents. Print-quality archival feel. No text, no logos. Wide cover aspect.

Subject: An editorial cover illustration on warm cream paper, deep Alberta navy line work with small rust-coloured accents. A central walled keep sits at the middle, and around it many small open workshops and benches are connected to it by light paths, suggesting a protected core with building happening freely all around. Calm, archival, abstract. Wide cover aspect. No text, no logos, no people.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
